HomePage.subtitle: I am a trainee web developer, currently in a work-study program.
HomePage.stackDescription: Still learning, I opted for a stack I’m comfortable with, but I remain open to all opportunities to learn new technologies.
HomePage.projectsDescription: Here is some projects I made during my journey
HomePage.projectsDescriptionStoryTeller: Collaborative literary creation platform based on the concept of "cadavre exquis". This application allows users to participate in the writing of collective stories, developed as part of an academic end-of-studies project.
HomePage.projectsDescriptionDreams: Web application to track and rate your readings, using the Google Books API, developed as part of an academic end-of-studies project.
HomePage.projectsDescriptionAdopteUnCube: Showcase site designed and developed for a community of players, mainly focused on Minecraft. I took charge of the entire design and technical implementation.
HomePage.storytellerObjective: This project was carried out as an end-of-year assignment during my first year of work-study training at IFAPME in Charleroi. The goal was to put into practice the skills acquired during the year, which is why the project is written in PHP. The application aims to provide a collaborative writing platform inspired by the 'cadavre exquis' game: anyone can start a story, limited by a number of words, then another person can continue the story, and so on.
HomePage.storytellerResponsabilities: For this project, I designed almost all of the layout myself, drawing inspiration from the style of a real written newspaper, notably the New York Times. I also tackled several technical challenges: setting up a secure registration and login system, designing a MySQL schema suited to the planned features, and developing all user interactions (adding and continuing stories, likes, search, etc.).
HomePage.storytellerObstacles: The main challenge of this project was to design a user interface that was both aesthetic and functional, while respecting the technical constraints of PHP. I also had to learn how to manage interactions with a MySQL database, which was new to me at the time. Finally, I encountered an issue with slow loading of story pages, which I solved by implementing efficient pagination and asynchronous content loading.

hero.sub: Florian Donckers — creative web dev at Hilarious Agency. I craft games, micro-sites and interactive prototypes where every pixel has a reason to be there.

about.title: About
about.pull: I build things that react — to scroll, to clicks, to whoever holds the mouse.
about.p1: I've been a web dev since 2023, currently at Hilarious Agency in Brussels, a creative marketing agency.
about.p2: Every month I ship a new gamification experience — platformer, runner, puzzle — mainly for Proximus For You, their loyalty programme. It's a permanent playground where I have to learn fast, ship fast, and have fun.
about.p3: I'm obsessed with generative AI and how it lands in everyday tools. Technical curiosity is my engine.
